metadata.significance: Detailed story of Moses and Pharaoh, begins with mysterious letters

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ طه
ayahs.transliteration: Taha

translations.en_sahih: Ta, Ha.
translations.en_yusufali: Ta-Ha.
translations.ms_basmeih: Taa' Haa.

ayahs.arabic: مَآ أَنزَلْنَا عَلَيْكَ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِتَشْقَىٰٓ
ayahs.transliteration: Ma anzalna AAalayka alqurana litashqa

translations.en_sahih: We have not sent down to you the Qur'an that you be distressed
translations.en_yusufali: We have not sent down the Qur'an to thee to be (an occasion) for thy distress,
translations.ms_basmeih: Kami tidak menurunkan Al-Quran kepadamu (wahai Muhammad) supaya engkau menanggung kesusahan.

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا تَذْكِرَةً لِّمَن يَخْشَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Illa tathkiratan liman yakhsha

translations.en_sahih: But only as a reminder for those who fear [Allah] -
translations.en_yusufali: But only as an admonition to those who fear (Allah),-
translations.ms_basmeih: Hanya untuk menjadi peringatan bagi orang-orang yang takut melanggar perintah. Allah

ayahs.arabic: تَنزِيلًا مِّمَّنْ خَلَقَ ٱلْأَرْضَ وَٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ ٱلْعُلَى
ayahs.transliteration: Tanzeelan mimman khalaqa alarda waalssamawati alAAula

translations.en_sahih: A revelation from He who created the earth and highest heavens,
translations.en_yusufali: A revelation from Him Who created the earth and the heavens on high.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Al-Quran) diturunkan dari (Tuhan) yang menciptakan bumi dan langit yang tinggi.

ayahs.arabic: ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ عَلَى ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱسْتَوَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Alrrahmanu AAala alAAarshi istawa

translations.en_sahih: The Most Merciful [who is] above the Throne established.
translations.en_yusufali: (Allah) Most Gracious is firmly established on the throne (of authority).
translations.ms_basmeih: Iaitu (Allah) Ar-Rahman, yang bersemayam di atas Arasy.

ayahs.arabic: لَهُۥ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا وَمَا تَحْتَ ٱلثَّرَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Lahu ma fee alssamawati wama fee alardi wama baynahuma wama tahta alththara

translations.en_sahih: To Him belongs what is in the heavens and what is on the earth and what is between them and what is under the soil.
translations.en_yusufali: To Him belongs what is in the heavens and on earth, and all between them, and all beneath the soil.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dia lah jua yang memiliki segala yang ada di langit dan yang ada di bumi serta yang ada di antara keduanya dan juga yang ada di bawah tanah basah di perut bumi.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِن تَجْهَرْ بِٱلْقَوْلِ فَإِنَّهُۥ يَعْلَمُ ٱلسِّرَّ وَأَخْفَى
ayahs.transliteration: Wain tajhar bialqawli fainnahu yaAAlamu alssirra waakhfa

translations.en_sahih: And if you speak aloud - then indeed, He knows the secret and what is [even] more hidden.
translations.en_yusufali: If thou pronounce the word aloud, (it is no matter): for verily He knoweth what is secret and what is yet more hidden.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan jika engkau menyaringkan suara dengan doa permohonanmu, (maka yang demikian tidaklah perlu), kerana sesungguhnya Allah mengetahui segala rahsia dan segala yang tersembunyi.

ayahs.arabic: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۖ لَهُ ٱلْأَسْمَآءُ ٱلْحُسْنَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Allahu la ilaha illa huwa lahu alasmao alhusna

translations.en_sahih: Allah - there is no deity except Him. To Him belong the best names.
translations.en_yusufali: Allah! there is no god but He! To Him belong the most Beautiful Names.
translations.ms_basmeih: Allah! Tiada Tuhan yang berhak disembah melainkan Dia, bagiNyalah segala nama yang baik.

ayahs.arabic: وَهَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ مُوسَىٰٓ
ayahs.transliteration: Wahal ataka hadeethu moosa

translations.en_sahih: And has the story of Moses reached you? -
translations.en_yusufali: Has the story of Moses reached thee?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sudahkah sampai kepadamu (wahai Muhammad) perihal Nabi Musa?

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ رَءَا نَارًا فَقَالَ لِأَهْلِهِ ٱمْكُثُوٓا۟ إِنِّىٓ ءَانَسْتُ نَارًا لَّعَلِّىٓ ءَاتِيكُم مِّنْهَا بِقَبَسٍ أَوْ أَجِدُ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ هُدًى
ayahs.transliteration: Ith raa naran faqala liahlihi omkuthoo innee anastu naran laAAallee ateekum minha biqabasin aw ajidu AAala alnnari hudan

translations.en_sahih: When he saw a fire and said to his family, "Stay here; indeed, I have perceived a fire; perhaps I can bring you a torch or find at the fire some guidance."
translations.en_yusufali: Behold, he saw a fire: So he said to his family, "Tarry ye; I perceive a fire; perhaps I can bring you some burning brand therefrom, or find some guidance at the fire."
translations.ms_basmeih: Ketika ia melihat api, lalu berkatalah ia kepada isterinya: "Berhentilah! Sesungguhnya aku ada melihat api semoga aku dapat membawa kepada kamu satu cucuhan daripadanya, atau aku dapat di tempat api itu: penunjuk jalan.

ayahs.arabic: فَلَمَّآ أَتَىٰهَا نُودِىَ يَـٰمُوسَىٰٓ
ayahs.transliteration: Falamma ataha noodiya ya moosa

translations.en_sahih: And when he came to it, he was called, "O Moses,
translations.en_yusufali: But when he came to the fire, a voice was heard: "O Moses!
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka apabila ia sampai ke tempat api itu (kedengaran) ia diseru: "Wahai Musa! " -

ayahs.arabic: إِنِّىٓ أَنَا۠ رَبُّكَ فَٱخْلَعْ نَعْلَيْكَ ۖ إِنَّكَ بِٱلْوَادِ ٱلْمُقَدَّسِ طُوًى
ayahs.transliteration: Innee ana rabbuka faikhlaAA naAAlayka innaka bialwadi almuqaddasi tuwan

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, I am your Lord, so remove your sandals. Indeed, you are in the sacred valley of Tuwa.
translations.en_yusufali: "Verily I am thy Lord! therefore (in My presence) put off thy shoes: thou art in the sacred valley Tuwa.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Sesungguhnya Aku Tuhanmu! Maka bukalah kasutmu, kerana engkau sekarang berada di Wadi Tuwa yang suci.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَنَا ٱخْتَرْتُكَ فَٱسْتَمِعْ لِمَا يُوحَىٰٓ
ayahs.transliteration: Waana ikhtartuka faistamiAA lima yooha

translations.en_sahih: And I have chosen you, so listen to what is revealed [to you].
translations.en_yusufali: "I have chosen thee: listen, then, to the inspiration (sent to thee).
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan Aku telah memilihmu menjadi Rasul maka dengarlah apa yang akan diwahyukan kepadamu.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّنِىٓ أَنَا ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنَا۠ فَٱعْبُدْنِى وَأَقِمِ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ لِذِكْرِىٓ
ayahs.transliteration: Innanee ana Allahu la ilaha illa ana faoAAbudnee waaqimi alssalata lithikree

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, I am Allah. There is no deity except Me, so worship Me and establish prayer for My remembrance.
translations.en_yusufali: "Verily, I am Allah: There is no god but I: So serve thou Me (only), and establish regular prayer for celebrating My praise.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Sesungguhnya Akulah Allah; tiada tuhan melainkan Aku; oleh itu, sembahlah akan Daku, dan dirikanlah sembahyang untuk mengingati Daku.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ ءَاتِيَةٌ أَكَادُ أُخْفِيهَا لِتُجْزَىٰ كُلُّ نَفْسٍۭ بِمَا تَسْعَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna alssaAAata atiyatun akadu okhfeeha litujza kullu nafsin bima tasAAa

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, the Hour is coming - I almost conceal it - so that every soul may be recompensed according to that for which it strives.
translations.en_yusufali: "Verily the Hour is coming - My design is to keep it hidden - for every soul to receive its reward by the measure of its Endeavour.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Sesungguhnya hari kiamat itu tetap akan datang - yang Aku sengaja sembunyikan masa datangnya - supaya tiap-tiap diri dibalas akan apa yang ia usahakan.

ayahs.arabic: فَلَا يَصُدَّنَّكَ عَنْهَا مَن لَّا يُؤْمِنُ بِهَا وَٱتَّبَعَ هَوَىٰهُ فَتَرْدَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Fala yasuddannaka AAanha man la yuminu biha waittabaAAa hawahu fatarda

translations.en_sahih: So do not let one avert you from it who does not believe in it and follows his desire, for you [then] would perish.
translations.en_yusufali: "Therefore let not such as believe not therein but follow their own lusts, divert thee therefrom, lest thou perish!"..
translations.ms_basmeih: "Maka janganlah engkau dihalangi daripada mempercayainya oleh orang yang tidak beriman kepadanya serta ia menurut hawa nafsunya; kerana dengan itu engkau akan binasa.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا تِلْكَ بِيَمِينِكَ يَـٰمُوسَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama tilka biyameenika ya moosa

translations.en_sahih: And what is that in your right hand, O Moses?"
translations.en_yusufali: "And what is that in the right hand, O Moses?"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan apa (bendanya) yang di tangan kananmu itu wahai Musa?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ هِىَ عَصَاىَ أَتَوَكَّؤُا۟ عَلَيْهَا وَأَهُشُّ بِهَا عَلَىٰ غَنَمِى وَلِىَ فِيهَا مَـَٔارِبُ أُخْرَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala hiya AAasaya atawakkao AAalayha waahushshu biha AAala ghanamee waliya feeha maaribu okhra

translations.en_sahih: He said, "It is my staff; I lean upon it, and I bring down leaves for my sheep and I have therein other uses."
translations.en_yusufali: He said, "It is my rod: on it I lean; with it I beat down fodder for my flocks; and in it I find other uses."
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Musa menjawab: "Ini ialah tongkatku; aku bertekan atasnya semasa, berjalan, dan aku memukul dengannya daun-daun kayu supaya gugur kepada kambing-kambingku, dan ada lagi lain-lain keperluanku pada tongkat itu".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ أَلْقِهَا يَـٰمُوسَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala alqiha ya moosa

translations.en_sahih: [Allah] said, "Throw it down, O Moses."
translations.en_yusufali: (Allah) said, "Throw it, O Moses!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Allah Taala berfirman: "Campakkanlah tongkatmu itu wahai Musa!"

ayahs.arabic: فَأَلْقَىٰهَا فَإِذَا هِىَ حَيَّةٌ تَسْعَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Faalqaha faitha hiya hayyatun tasAAa

translations.en_sahih: So he threw it down, and thereupon it was a snake, moving swiftly.
translations.en_yusufali: He threw it, and behold! It was a snake, active in motion.
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu ia mencampakkannya, maka tiba-tiba tongkatnya itu menjadi seekor ular yang bergerak menjalar.

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ خُذْهَا وَلَا تَخَفْ ۖ سَنُعِيدُهَا سِيرَتَهَا ٱلْأُولَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala khuthha wala takhaf sanuAAeeduha seerataha aloola

translations.en_sahih: [Allah] said, "Seize it and fear not; We will return it to its former condition.
translations.en_yusufali: (Allah) said, "Seize it, and fear not: We shall return it at once to its former condition"..
translations.ms_basmeih: Allah berfirman: "Tangkaplah akan dia, dan janganlah engkau takut, Kami akan mengembalikannya kepada keadaannya yang asal.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱضْمُمْ يَدَكَ إِلَىٰ جَنَاحِكَ تَخْرُجْ بَيْضَآءَ مِنْ غَيْرِ سُوٓءٍ ءَايَةً أُخْرَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Waodmum yadaka ila janahika takhruj baydaa min ghayri sooin ayatan okhra

translations.en_sahih: And draw in your hand to your side; it will come out white without disease - another sign,
translations.en_yusufali: "Now draw thy hand close to thy side: It shall come forth white (and shining), without harm (or stain),- as another Sign,-
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan kepitlah tanganmu di celah lambungmu; nescaya keluarlah ia putih bersinar-sinar dengan tidak ada cacat; sebagai satu mukjizat yang lain.

ayahs.arabic: لِنُرِيَكَ مِنْ ءَايَـٰتِنَا ٱلْكُبْرَى
ayahs.transliteration: Linuriyaka min ayatina alkubra

translations.en_sahih: That We may show you [some] of Our greater signs.
translations.en_yusufali: "In order that We may show thee (two) of our Greater Signs.
translations.ms_basmeih: "(Berlakunya yang demikian itu) kerana Kami hendak memperlihatkan kepadamu sebahagian dari tanda-tanda kekuasaan Kami yang besar.

ayahs.arabic: ٱذْهَبْ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّهُۥ طَغَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Ithhab ila firAAawna innahu tagha

translations.en_sahih: Go to Pharaoh. Indeed, he has transgressed."
translations.en_yusufali: "Go thou to Pharaoh, for he has indeed transgressed all bounds."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Pergilah kepada Firaun, sesungguhnya ia telah melampaui batas".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱشْرَحْ لِى صَدْرِى
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbi ishrah lee sadree

translations.en_sahih: [Moses] said, "My Lord, expand for me my breast [with assurance]
translations.en_yusufali: (Moses) said: "O my Lord! expand me my breast;
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Musa berdoa dengan berkata: "Wahai Tuhanku, lapangkanlah bagiku, dadaku;

ayahs.arabic: وَيَسِّرْ لِىٓ أَمْرِى
ayahs.transliteration: Wayassir lee amree

translations.en_sahih: And ease for me my task
translations.en_yusufali: "Ease my task for me;
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan mudahkanlah bagiku, tugasku;

ayahs.arabic: وَٱحْلُلْ عُقْدَةً مِّن لِّسَانِى
ayahs.transliteration: Waohlul AAuqdatan min lisanee

translations.en_sahih: And untie the knot from my tongue
translations.en_yusufali: "And remove the impediment from my speech,
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan lepaskanlah simpulan dari lidahku,

ayahs.arabic: يَفْقَهُوا۟ قَوْلِى
ayahs.transliteration: Yafqahoo qawlee

translations.en_sahih: That they may understand my speech.
translations.en_yusufali: "So they may understand what I say:
translations.ms_basmeih: "Supaya mereka faham perkataanku;

ayahs.arabic: وَٱجْعَل لِّى وَزِيرًا مِّنْ أَهْلِى
ayahs.transliteration: WaijAAal lee wazeeran min ahlee

translations.en_sahih: And appoint for me a minister from my family -
translations.en_yusufali: "And give me a Minister from my family,
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan jadikanlah bagiku, seorang penyokong dari keluargaku.

ayahs.arabic: هَـٰرُونَ أَخِى
ayahs.transliteration: Haroona akhee

translations.en_sahih: Aaron, my brother.
translations.en_yusufali: "Aaron, my brother;
translations.ms_basmeih: "Iaitu Harun saudaraku;

ayahs.arabic: ٱشْدُدْ بِهِۦٓ أَزْرِى
ayahs.transliteration: Oshdud bihi azree

translations.en_sahih: Increase through him my strength
translations.en_yusufali: "Add to my strength through him,
translations.ms_basmeih: "Kuatkanlah dengan sokongannya, pendirianku,

ayahs.arabic: وَأَشْرِكْهُ فِىٓ أَمْرِى
ayahs.transliteration: Waashrikhu fee amree

translations.en_sahih: And let him share my task
translations.en_yusufali: "And make him share my task:
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan jadikanlah dia turut campur bertanggungjawab dalam urusanku,

ayahs.arabic: كَىْ نُسَبِّحَكَ كَثِيرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Kay nusabbihaka katheeran

translations.en_sahih: That we may exalt You much
translations.en_yusufali: "That we may celebrate Thy praise without stint,
translations.ms_basmeih: "Supaya kami sentiasa beribadat dan memujiMu,

ayahs.arabic: وَنَذْكُرَكَ كَثِيرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wanathkuraka katheeran

translations.en_sahih: And remember You much.
translations.en_yusufali: "And remember Thee without stint:
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan (supaya) kami sentiasa menyebut dan mengingatiMu;

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّكَ كُنتَ بِنَا بَصِيرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Innaka kunta bina baseeran

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, You are of us ever Seeing."
translations.en_yusufali: "For Thou art He that (ever) regardeth us."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Sesungguhnya Engkau adalah sedia melihat dan mengetahui hal ehwal kami".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ قَدْ أُوتِيتَ سُؤْلَكَ يَـٰمُوسَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala qad ooteeta sulaka ya moosa

translations.en_sahih: [Allah] said, "You have been granted your request, O Moses.
translations.en_yusufali: (Allah) said: "Granted is thy prayer, O Moses!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Allah berfirman: "Sesungguhnya telah diberikan kepadamu apa yang engkau pohonkan itu, wahai Musa!

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ مَنَنَّا عَلَيْكَ مَرَّةً أُخْرَىٰٓ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad mananna AAalayka marratan okhra

translations.en_sahih: And We had already conferred favor upon you another time,
translations.en_yusufali: "And indeed We conferred a favour on thee another time (before).
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan demi sesungguhnya! Kami telahpun mengurniakan kepadamu berbagai nikmat pada satu masa yang lain sebelum ini.

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ أَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰٓ أُمِّكَ مَا يُوحَىٰٓ
ayahs.transliteration: Ith awhayna ila ommika ma yooha

translations.en_sahih: When We inspired to your mother what We inspired,
translations.en_yusufali: "Behold! We sent to thy mother, by inspiration, the message:
translations.ms_basmeih: "Ketika Kami ilhamkan kepada ibumu, dengan memberitahu kepadanya:

ayahs.arabic: أَنِ ٱقْذِفِيهِ فِى ٱلتَّابُوتِ فَٱقْذِفِيهِ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ فَلْيُلْقِهِ ٱلْيَمُّ بِٱلسَّاحِلِ يَأْخُذْهُ عَدُوٌّ لِّى وَعَدُوٌّ لَّهُۥ ۚ وَأَلْقَيْتُ عَلَيْكَ مَحَبَّةً مِّنِّى وَلِتُصْنَعَ عَلَىٰ عَيْنِىٓ
ayahs.transliteration: Ani iqthifeehi fee alttabooti faiqthifeehi fee alyammi falyulqihi alyammu bialssahili yakhuthhu AAaduwwun lee waAAaduwwun lahu waalqaytu AAalayka mahabbatan minnee walitusnaAAa AAala AAaynee

translations.en_sahih: [Saying], 'Cast him into the chest and cast it into the river, and the river will throw it onto the bank; there will take him an enemy to Me and an enemy to him.' And I bestowed upon you love from Me that you would be brought up under My eye.
translations.en_yusufali: "'Throw (the child) into the chest, and throw (the chest) into the river: the river will cast him up on the bank, and he will be taken up by one who is an enemy to Me and an enemy to him': But I cast (the garment of) love over thee from Me: and (this) in order that thou mayest be reared under Mine eye.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Letakkanlah anakmu di dalam peti, kemudian lepaskanlah peti itu ke laut, maka biarlah laut itu membawanya terdampar ke pantai, supaya dipungut oleh musuhKu dan musuhnya; dan Aku telah tanamkan dari kemurahanKu perasaan kasih sayang orang terhadapmu; dan supaya engkau dibela dan dipelihara dengan pengawasanKu.

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ تَمْشِىٓ أُخْتُكَ فَتَقُولُ هَلْ أَدُلُّكُمْ عَلَىٰ مَن يَكْفُلُهُۥ ۖ فَرَجَعْنَـٰكَ إِلَىٰٓ أُمِّكَ كَىْ تَقَرَّ عَيْنُهَا وَلَا تَحْزَنَ ۚ وَقَتَلْتَ نَفْسًا فَنَجَّيْنَـٰكَ مِنَ ٱلْغَمِّ وَفَتَنَّـٰكَ فُتُونًا ۚ فَلَبِثْتَ سِنِينَ فِىٓ أَهْلِ مَدْيَنَ ثُمَّ جِئْتَ عَلَىٰ قَدَرٍ يَـٰمُوسَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Ith tamshee okhtuka fataqoolu hal adullukum AAala man yakfuluhu farajaAAnaka ila ommika kay taqarra AAaynuha wala tahzana waqatalta nafsan fanajjaynaka mina alghammi wafatannaka futoonan falabithta sineena fee ahli madyana thumma jita AAala qadarin ya moosa

translations.en_sahih: [And We favored you] when your sister went and said, 'Shall I direct you to someone who will be responsible for him?' So We restored you to your mother that she might be content and not grieve. And you killed someone, but We saved you from retaliation and tried you with a [severe] trial. And you remained [some] years among the people of Madyan. Then you came [here] at the decreed time, O Moses.
translations.en_yusufali: "Behold! thy sister goeth forth and saith, 'shall I show you one who will nurse and rear the (child)?' So We brought thee back to thy mother, that her eye might be cooled and she should not grieve. Then thou didst slay a man, but We saved thee from trouble, and We tried thee in various ways. Then didst thou tarry a number of years with the people of Midian. Then didst thou come hither as ordained, O Moses!
translations.ms_basmeih: "Ketika saudara perempuanmu pergi mencarimu lalu berkata kepada orang-orang yang memungutmu:" Mahukah, aku tunjukkan kamu kepada orang yang boleh memeliharanya?" Maka dengan jalan itu Kami mengembalikanmu kepada ibumu supaya tenang hatinya dan supaya ia tidak berdukacita kerana bercerai denganmu; dan semasa engkau membunuh seorang lelaki, lalu Kami selamatkan engkau dari kesusahan pembunuhan itu; dan Kami telah melepaskan engkau berkali-kali dari berbagai-bagai cubaan; kemudian engkau tinggal dengan selamat beberapa tahun dalam kalangan penduduk negeri Madyan; setelah itu engkau sekarang datang dari sana pada masa yang telah ditentukan, wahai Musa!

ayahs.arabic: وَٱصْطَنَعْتُكَ لِنَفْسِى
ayahs.transliteration: WaistanaAAtuka linafsee

translations.en_sahih: And I produced you for Myself.
translations.en_yusufali: "And I have prepared thee for Myself (for service)"..
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan Aku telah memilihmu untuk menjadi RasulKu.

ayahs.arabic: ٱذْهَبْ أَنتَ وَأَخُوكَ بِـَٔايَـٰتِى وَلَا تَنِيَا فِى ذِكْرِى
ayahs.transliteration: Ithhab anta waakhooka biayatee wala taniya fee thikree

translations.en_sahih: Go, you and your brother, with My signs and do not slacken in My remembrance.
translations.en_yusufali: "Go, thou and thy brother, with My Signs, and slacken not, either of you, in keeping Me in remembrance.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Pergilah, engkau dan saudaramu, membawa mukjizat-mukjizat pengurniaanKu dan janganlah kamu berdua lemah dan cuai dalam menyebut serta mengingati Daku.

ayahs.arabic: ٱذْهَبَآ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّهُۥ طَغَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Ithhaba ila firAAawna innahu tagha

translations.en_sahih: Go, both of you, to Pharaoh. Indeed, he has transgressed.
translations.en_yusufali: "Go, both of you, to Pharaoh, for he has indeed transgressed all bounds;
translations.ms_basmeih: "Pergilah kamu berdua kepada Firaun, sesungguhnya ia telah melampaui batas dalam kekufurannya.

ayahs.arabic: فَقُولَا لَهُۥ قَوْلًا لَّيِّنًا لَّعَلَّهُۥ يَتَذَكَّرُ أَوْ يَخْشَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Faqoola lahu qawlan layyinan laAAallahu yatathakkaru aw yakhsha

translations.en_sahih: And speak to him with gentle speech that perhaps he may be reminded or fear [Allah]."
translations.en_yusufali: "But speak to him mildly; perchance he may take warning or fear (Allah)."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Kemudian hendaklah kamu berkata kepadanya, dengan kata-kata yang lemah-lembut, semoga ia beringat atau takut".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَا رَبَّنَآ إِنَّنَا نَخَافُ أَن يَفْرُطَ عَلَيْنَآ أَوْ أَن يَطْغَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbana innana nakhafu an yafruta AAalayna aw an yatgha

translations.en_sahih: They said, "Our Lord, indeed we are afraid that he will hasten [punishment] against us or that he will transgress."
translations.en_yusufali: They (Moses and Aaron) said: "Our Lord! We fear lest he hasten with insolence against us, or lest he transgress all bounds."
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka berdua berkata: "Wahai Tuhan kami! Sesungguhnya kami takut bahawa ia akan segera menyeksa kami, atau ia akan melampau batas".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ لَا تَخَافَآ ۖ إِنَّنِى مَعَكُمَآ أَسْمَعُ وَأَرَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala la takhafa innanee maAAakuma asmaAAu waara

translations.en_sahih: [Allah] said, "Fear not. Indeed, I am with you both; I hear and I see.
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "Fear not: for I am with you: I hear and see (everything).
translations.ms_basmeih: Allah berfirman: "Janganlah kamu takut, sesungguhnya Aku ada bersama-sama kamu; Aku mendengar dan melihat segala-galanya.

ayahs.arabic: فَأْتِيَاهُ فَقُولَآ إِنَّا رَسُولَا رَبِّكَ فَأَرْسِلْ مَعَنَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ وَلَا تُعَذِّبْهُمْ ۖ قَدْ جِئْنَـٰكَ بِـَٔايَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۖ وَٱلسَّلَـٰمُ عَلَىٰ مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
ayahs.transliteration: Fatiyahu faqoola inna rasoola rabbika faarsil maAAana banee israeela wala tuAAaththibhum qad jinaka biayatin min rabbika waalssalamu AAala mani ittabaAAa alhuda

translations.en_sahih: So go to him and say, 'Indeed, we are messengers of your Lord, so send with us the Children of Israel and do not torment them. We have come to you with a sign from your Lord. And peace will be upon he who follows the guidance.
translations.en_yusufali: "So go ye both to him, and say, 'Verily we are messengers sent by thy Lord: Send forth, therefore, the Children of Israel with us, and afflict them not: with a Sign, indeed, have we come from thy Lord! and peace to all who follow guidance!
translations.ms_basmeih: "Oleh itu, pergilah kamu berdua kepadanya, kemudian katakanlah: "Bahawa sesungguhnya kami ini Rasul-rasul dari Tuhanmu, maka bebaskanlah kaum Bani lsrail mengikut kami, dan janganlah engkau menyeksakan mereka. Sesungguhnya kami telah datang kepadamu membawa satu tanda (mukjizat) dari Tuhanmu! Dan selamat sejahtera itu adalah untuk orang-orang yang menurut petunjuk ugama Allah.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا قَدْ أُوحِىَ إِلَيْنَآ أَنَّ ٱلْعَذَابَ عَلَىٰ مَن كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna qad oohiya ilayna anna alAAathaba AAala man kaththaba watawalla

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, it has been revealed to us that the punishment will be upon whoever denies and turns away.' "
translations.en_yusufali: "'Verily it has been revealed to us that the Penalty (awaits) those who reject and turn away.'"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Sesungguhnya telah diwahyukan kepada kami bahawa azab seksa di dunia dan di akhirat ditimpakan kepada orang yang mendustakan ayat-ayat Allah dan berpaling daripadanya".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ فَمَن رَّبُّكُمَا يَـٰمُوسَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala faman rabbukuma ya moosa

translations.en_sahih: [Pharaoh] said, "So who is the Lord of you two, O Moses?"
translations.en_yusufali: (When this message was delivered), (Pharaoh) said: "Who, then, O Moses, is the Lord of you two?"
translations.ms_basmeih: (Setelah mereka menyampaikan perintah Allah itu), Firaun berkata: "Jika demikian, siapakah Tuhan kamu berdua, hai Musa?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبُّنَا ٱلَّذِىٓ أَعْطَىٰ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلْقَهُۥ ثُمَّ هَدَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbuna allathee aAAta kulla shayin khalqahu thumma hada

translations.en_sahih: He said, "Our Lord is He who gave each thing its form and then guided [it]."
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "Our Lord is He Who gave to each (created) thing its form and nature, and further, gave (it) guidance."
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Musa menjawab: "Tuhan kami ialah yang telah memberikan kepada tiap-tiap sesuatu: kejadian semulajadinya yang sesuai dengannya, kemudian Ia memberi petunjuk kepadanya akan cara menggunakannya".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ فَمَا بَالُ ٱلْقُرُونِ ٱلْأُولَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala fama balu alqurooni aloola

translations.en_sahih: [Pharaoh] said, "Then what is the case of the former generations?"
translations.en_yusufali: (Pharaoh) said: "What then is the condition of previous generations?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Firaun bertanya lagi: "Jika demikian, bagaimana pula keadaan kaum-kaum yang telah lalu?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ عِلْمُهَا عِندَ رَبِّى فِى كِتَـٰبٍ ۖ لَّا يَضِلُّ رَبِّى وَلَا يَنسَى
ayahs.transliteration: Qala AAilmuha AAinda rabbee fee kitabin la yadillu rabbee wala yansa

translations.en_sahih: [Moses] said, "The knowledge thereof is with my Lord in a record. My Lord neither errs nor forgets."
translations.en_yusufali: He replied: "The knowledge of that is with my Lord, duly recorded: my Lord never errs, nor forgets,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Musa menjawab: "Pengetahuan mengenainya ada di sisi Tuhanku, tertulis di dalam sebuah Kitab; Tuhanku tidak pernah keliru dan Ia juga tidak pernah lupa".

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ مَهْدًا وَسَلَكَ لَكُمْ فِيهَا سُبُلًا وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَخْرَجْنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزْوَٰجًا مِّن نَّبَاتٍ شَتَّىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Allathee jaAAala lakumu alarda mahdan wasalaka lakum feeha subulan waanzala mina alssamai maan faakhrajna bihi azwajan min nabatin shatta

translations.en_sahih: [It is He] who has made for you the earth as a bed [spread out] and inserted therein for you roadways and sent down from the sky, rain and produced thereby categories of various plants.
translations.en_yusufali: "He Who has, made for you the earth like a carpet spread out; has enabled you to go about therein by roads (and channels); and has sent down water from the sky." With it have We produced diverse pairs of plants each separate from the others.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Dia lah Tuhan) yang telah menjadikan bumi bagi kamu sebagai hamparan, dan Ia telah mengadakan bagi kamu padanya jalan-jalan lalu-lalang; dan Ia juga telah menurunkan hujan dari langit. Maka Kami keluarkan dengannya berjenis-jenis tanaman dan buah-buahan yang berlainan keadaannya.

ayahs.arabic: كُلُوا۟ وَٱرْعَوْا۟ أَنْعَـٰمَكُمْ ۗ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَـٰتٍ لِّأُو۟لِى ٱلنُّهَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Kuloo wairAAaw anAAamakum inna fee thalika laayatin liolee alnnuha

translations.en_sahih: Eat [therefrom] and pasture your livestock. Indeed, in that are signs for those of intelligence.
translations.en_yusufali: Eat (for yourselves) and pasture your cattle: verily, in this are Signs for men endued with understanding.
translations.ms_basmeih: Makanlah kamu daripadanya dan berilah makan binatang-binatang ternak kamu; sesungguhnya semuanya itu mengandungi tanda-tanda yang membuktikan kemurahan Allah, bagi orang-orang yang berakal fikiran.

ayahs.arabic: ۞ مِنْهَا خَلَقْنَـٰكُمْ وَفِيهَا نُعِيدُكُمْ وَمِنْهَا نُخْرِجُكُمْ تَارَةً أُخْرَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Minha khalaqnakum wafeeha nuAAeedukum waminha nukhrijukum taratan okhra

translations.en_sahih: From the earth We created you, and into it We will return you, and from it We will extract you another time.
translations.en_yusufali: From the (earth) did We create you, and into it shall We return you, and from it shall We bring you out once again.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dari bumilah Kami ciptakan kamu, dan ke dalamnya Kami akan mengembalikan kamu, dan daripadanya pula Kami akan mengeluarkan kamu sekali lagi.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرَيْنَـٰهُ ءَايَـٰتِنَا كُلَّهَا فَكَذَّبَ وَأَبَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad araynahu ayatina kullaha fakaththaba waaba

translations.en_sahih: And We certainly showed Pharaoh Our signs - all of them - but he denied and refused.
translations.en_yusufali: And We showed Pharaoh all Our Signs, but he did reject and refuse.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya! Kami telah tunjukkan kepada Firaun segala tanda-tanda yang membukti kekuasaan Kami; dalam pada itu ia mendustakannya dan enggan beriman.

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ أَجِئْتَنَا لِتُخْرِجَنَا مِنْ أَرْضِنَا بِسِحْرِكَ يَـٰمُوسَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala ajitana litukhrijana min ardina bisihrika ya moosa

translations.en_sahih: He said, "Have you come to us to drive us out of our land with your magic, O Moses?
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "Hast thou come to drive us out of our land with thy magic, O Moses?
translations.ms_basmeih: Firaun berkata: "Patutkah engkau datang kepada kami untuk mengeluarkan kami dari negeri kami dengan sihirmu, hai Musa?

ayahs.arabic: فَلَنَأْتِيَنَّكَ بِسِحْرٍ مِّثْلِهِۦ فَٱجْعَلْ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَكَ مَوْعِدًا لَّا نُخْلِفُهُۥ نَحْنُ وَلَآ أَنتَ مَكَانًا سُوًى
ayahs.transliteration: Falanatiyannaka bisihrin mithlihi faijAAal baynana wabaynaka mawAAidan la nukhlifuhu nahnu wala anta makanan suwan

translations.en_sahih: Then we will surely bring you magic like it, so make between us and you an appointment, which we will not fail to keep and neither will you, in a place assigned."
translations.en_yusufali: "But we can surely produce magic to match thine! So make a tryst between us and thee, which we shall not fail to keep - neither we nor thou - in a place where both shall have even chances."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Kalau demikian, sesungguhnya kami juga akan bawakan kepadamu sihir yang seperti itu untuk melawanmu! Maka tentukanlah suatu tempoh pertemuan antara kami denganmu, yang kita bersama tidak akan memungkirinya, di suatu tempat yang sesuai bagi kedua belah pihak".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ مَوْعِدُكُمْ يَوْمُ ٱلزِّينَةِ وَأَن يُحْشَرَ ٱلنَّاسُ ضُحًى
ayahs.transliteration: Qala mawAAidukum yawmu alzzeenati waan yuhshara alnnasu duhan

translations.en_sahih: [Moses] said, "Your appointment is on the day of the festival when the people assemble at mid-morning."
translations.en_yusufali: Moses said: "Your tryst is the Day of the Festival, and let the people be assembled when the sun is well up."
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Musa menjawab: "Tempoh yang aku tetapkan untuk kamu itu ialah hari perayaan, dan hendaklah orang ramai berhimpun pada waktu dhuha".

ayahs.arabic: فَتَوَلَّىٰ فِرْعَوْنُ فَجَمَعَ كَيْدَهُۥ ثُمَّ أَتَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Fatawalla firAAawnu fajamaAAa kaydahu thumma ata

translations.en_sahih: So Pharaoh went away, put together his plan, and then came [to Moses].
translations.en_yusufali: So Pharaoh withdrew: He concerted his plan, and then came (back).
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka Firaun pun berangkat dari majlis itu. Ia mengumpulkan ahli-ahli sihir untuk menjalankan tipu-dayanya, kemudian ia datang ke tempat perlawanan.

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ لَهُم مُّوسَىٰ وَيْلَكُمْ لَا تَفْتَرُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا فَيُسْحِتَكُم بِعَذَابٍ ۖ وَقَدْ خَابَ مَنِ ٱفْتَرَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala lahum moosa waylakum la taftaroo AAala Allahi kathiban fayushitakum biAAathabin waqad khaba mani iftara

translations.en_sahih: Moses said to the magicians summoned by Pharaoh, "Woe to you! Do not invent a lie against Allah or He will exterminate you with a punishment; and he has failed who invents [such falsehood]."
translations.en_yusufali: Moses said to him: Woe to you! Forge not ye a lie against Allah, lest He destroy you (at once) utterly by chastisement: the forger must suffer frustration!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Musa berkata kepada mereka: "Celakalah kamu kelak! Janganlah kamu mendakwa secara dusta terhadap Allah, kerana dengan sebab itu Ia akan membinasakan kamu dengan azab seksa; dan sesungguhnya orang yang berdusta, tetap hampa dan kecewa".

ayahs.arabic: فَتَنَـٰزَعُوٓا۟ أَمْرَهُم بَيْنَهُمْ وَأَسَرُّوا۟ ٱلنَّجْوَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: FatanazaAAoo amrahum baynahum waasarroo alnnajwa

translations.en_sahih: So they disputed over their affair among themselves and concealed their private conversation.
translations.en_yusufali: So they disputed, one with another, over their affair, but they kept their talk secret.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka merekapun berbantahan dan berunding sesama sendiri mengenai perkara sihir mereka, dan mereka rahsiakan apa yang mereka rundingkan.

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنْ هَـٰذَٰنِ لَسَـٰحِرَٰنِ يُرِيدَانِ أَن يُخْرِجَاكُم مِّنْ أَرْضِكُم بِسِحْرِهِمَا وَيَذْهَبَا بِطَرِيقَتِكُمُ ٱلْمُثْلَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo in hathani lasahirani yureedani an yukhrijakum min ardikum bisihrihima wayathhaba bitareeqatikumu almuthla

translations.en_sahih: They said, "Indeed, these are two magicians who want to drive you out of your land with their magic and do away with your most exemplary way.
translations.en_yusufali: They said: "These two are certainly (expert) magicians: their object is to drive you out from your land with their magic, and to do away with your most cherished institutions.
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka berkata: "Dua orang ini, sebenarnya dua ahli sihir yang bertujuan hendak mengeluarkan kamu dari negeri kamu dengan sihir mereka, dan hendak melenyapkan kepercayaan serta adat peraturan kamu yang utama.

ayahs.arabic: فَأَجْمِعُوا۟ كَيْدَكُمْ ثُمَّ ٱئْتُوا۟ صَفًّا ۚ وَقَدْ أَفْلَحَ ٱلْيَوْمَ مَنِ ٱسْتَعْلَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: FaajmiAAoo kaydakum thumma itoo saffan waqad aflaha alyawma mani istaAAla

translations.en_sahih: So resolve upon your plan and then come [forward] in line. And he has succeeded today who overcomes."
translations.en_yusufali: "Therefore concert your plan, and then assemble in (serried) ranks: He wins (all along) today who gains the upper hand."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Oleh itu, satukanlah segala cara helah kamu, kemudian datanglah beramai-ramai dalam satu barisan untuk menentangnya; dan sesungguhnya beruntunglah orang yang menang pada hari ini".

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ يَـٰمُوسَىٰٓ إِمَّآ أَن تُلْقِىَ وَإِمَّآ أَن نَّكُونَ أَوَّلَ مَنْ أَلْقَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo ya moosa imma an tulqiya waimma an nakoona awwala man alqa

translations.en_sahih: They said, "O Moses, either you throw or we will be the first to throw."
translations.en_yusufali: They said: "O Moses! whether wilt thou that thou throw (first) or that we be the first to throw?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka berkata: "Wahai Musa! Engkaukah yang akan mencampak lebih dahulu atau kamikah yang mula-mula mencampak?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ بَلْ أَلْقُوا۟ ۖ فَإِذَا حِبَالُهُمْ وَعِصِيُّهُمْ يُخَيَّلُ إِلَيْهِ مِن سِحْرِهِمْ أَنَّهَا تَسْعَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala bal alqoo faitha hibaluhum waAAisiyyuhum yukhayyalu ilayhi min sihrihim annaha tasAAa

translations.en_sahih: He said, "Rather, you throw." And suddenly their ropes and staffs seemed to him from their magic that they were moving [like snakes].
translations.en_yusufali: He said, "Nay, throw ye first!" Then behold their ropes and their rods-so it seemed to him on account of their magic - began to be in lively motion!
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Musa menjawab: "Bahkan kamulah campak dahulu". Tiba-tiba tali-tali mereka dan tongkat-tongkat mereka terbayang-bayang kepadanya seolah-olah benda-benda berjalan, disebabkan sihir mereka.

ayahs.arabic: فَأَوْجَسَ فِى نَفْسِهِۦ خِيفَةً مُّوسَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Faawjasa fee nafsihi kheefatan moosa

translations.en_sahih: And he sensed within himself apprehension, did Moses.
translations.en_yusufali: So Moses conceived in his mind a (sort of) fear.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang demikian menjadikan Nabi Musa merasa takut sedikit dalam hatinya.

ayahs.arabic: قُلْنَا لَا تَخَفْ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Qulna la takhaf innaka anta alaAAla

translations.en_sahih: Allah said, "Fear not. Indeed, it is you who are superior.
translations.en_yusufali: We said: "Fear not! for thou hast indeed the upper hand:
translations.ms_basmeih: Kami berfirman kepadanya: "Janganlah engkau takut (wahai Musa)! Sesungguhnya engkaulah yang tertinggi mengatasi mereka dengan kemenangan.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَلْقِ مَا فِى يَمِينِكَ تَلْقَفْ مَا صَنَعُوٓا۟ ۖ إِنَّمَا صَنَعُوا۟ كَيْدُ سَـٰحِرٍ ۖ وَلَا يُفْلِحُ ٱلسَّاحِرُ حَيْثُ أَتَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Waalqi ma fee yameenika talqaf ma sanaAAoo innama sanaAAoo kaydu sahirin wala yuflihu alssahiru haythu ata

translations.en_sahih: And throw what is in your right hand; it will swallow up what they have crafted. What they have crafted is but the trick of a magician, and the magician will not succeed wherever he is."
translations.en_yusufali: "Throw that which is in thy right hand: Quickly will it swallow up that which they have faked what they have faked is but a magician's trick: and the magician thrives not, (no matter) where he goes."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan campakkanlah apa yang ada di tangan kananmu, nescaya ia menelan segala (benda-benda sihir) yang mereka lakukan, kerana sesungguhnya apa yang mereka lakukan itu hanyalah tipu daya ahli sihir; sedang ahli sihir itu tidak akan beroleh kejayaan, di mana sahaja ia berada".

ayahs.arabic: فَأُلْقِىَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ سُجَّدًا قَالُوٓا۟ ءَامَنَّا بِرَبِّ هَـٰرُونَ وَمُوسَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Faolqiya alssaharatu sujjadan qaloo amanna birabbi haroona wamoosa

translations.en_sahih: So the magicians fell down in prostration. They said, "We have believed in the Lord of Aaron and Moses."
translations.en_yusufali: So the magicians were thrown down to prostration: they said, "We believe in the Lord of Aaron and Moses".
translations.ms_basmeih: (Nabi Musa pun mencampakkan tongkatnya yang terus menelan segala benda sihir mereka), maka keadaan yang demikian menjadikan ahli-ahli sihir itu segera merebahkan diri sujud sambil berkata: "Kami beriman kepada Tuhan yang mengutus Nabi Harun dan Nabi Musa".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ ءَامَنتُمْ لَهُۥ قَبْلَ أَنْ ءَاذَنَ لَكُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكَبِيرُكُمُ ٱلَّذِى عَلَّمَكُمُ ٱلسِّحْرَ ۖ فَلَأُقَطِّعَنَّ أَيْدِيَكُمْ وَأَرْجُلَكُم مِّنْ خِلَـٰفٍ وَلَأُصَلِّبَنَّكُمْ فِى جُذُوعِ ٱلنَّخْلِ وَلَتَعْلَمُنَّ أَيُّنَآ أَشَدُّ عَذَابًا وَأَبْقَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala amantum lahu qabla an athana lakum innahu lakabeerukumu allathee AAallamakumu alssihra falaoqattiAAanna aydiyakum waarjulakum min khilafin walaosallibannakum fee juthooAAi alnnakhli walataAAlamunna ayyuna ashaddu AAathaban waabqa

translations.en_sahih: [Pharaoh] said, "You believed him before I gave you permission. Indeed, he is your leader who has taught you magic. So I will surely cut off your hands and your feet on opposite sides, and I will crucify you on the trunks of palm trees, and you will surely know which of us is more severe in [giving] punishment and more enduring."
translations.en_yusufali: (Pharaoh) said: "Believe ye in Him before I give you permission? Surely this must be your leader, who has taught you magic! be sure I will cut off your hands and feet on opposite sides, and I will have you crucified on trunks of palm-trees: so shall ye know for certain, which of us can give the more severe and the more lasting punishment!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Firaun berkata: "Patutkah kamu beriman kepada Musa sebelum aku memberi izin kepada kamu? Sesungguhnya dia lah ketua kamu yang mengajar sihir kepada kamu. Oleh itu, demi sesungguhnya, aku akan memotong tangan dan kaki kamu dengan bersilang, dan aku akan memalang kamu pada batang-batang pohon tamar; dan demi sesungguhnya kamu akan mengetahui kelak siapakah di antara kita yang lebih keras azab seksanya dan lebih kekal".

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ لَن نُّؤْثِرَكَ عَلَىٰ مَا جَآءَنَا مِنَ ٱلْبَيِّنَـٰتِ وَٱلَّذِى فَطَرَنَا ۖ فَٱقْضِ مَآ أَنتَ قَاضٍ ۖ إِنَّمَا تَقْضِى هَـٰذِهِ ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَآ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo lan nuthiraka AAala ma jaana mina albayyinati waallathee fatarana faiqdi ma anta qadin innama taqdee hathihi alhayata alddunya

translations.en_sahih: They said, "Never will we prefer you over what has come to us of clear proofs and [over] He who created us. So decree whatever you are to decree. You can only decree for this worldly life.
translations.en_yusufali: They said: "Never shall we regard thee as more than the Clear Signs that have come to us, or than Him Who created us! so decree whatever thou desirest to decree: for thou canst only decree (touching) the life of this world.
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka menjawab: "Kami tidak sekali-kali akan mengutamakanmu daripada apa yang telah datang kepada kami dari mukjizat-mukjizat yang terang nyata, dan (tidak akan mengutamakanmu daripada) Tuhan yang telah menjadikan kita semua. Oleh itu, hukumkanlah apa sahaja yang engkau hendak hukumkan, kerana sesungguhnya engkau hanyalah dapat menghukum dalam kehidupan dunia ini sahaja.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّآ ءَامَنَّا بِرَبِّنَا لِيَغْفِرَ لَنَا خَطَـٰيَـٰنَا وَمَآ أَكْرَهْتَنَا عَلَيْهِ مِنَ ٱلسِّحْرِ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ خَيْرٌ وَأَبْقَىٰٓ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna amanna birabbina liyaghfira lana khatayana wama akrahtana AAalayhi mina alssihri waAllahu khayrun waabqa

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, we have believed in our Lord that He may forgive us our sins and what you compelled us [to do] of magic. And Allah is better and more enduring."
translations.en_yusufali: "For us, we have believed in our Lord: may He forgive us our faults, and the magic to which thou didst compel us: for Allah is Best and Most Abiding."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Sesungguhnya kami telah beriman kepada Tuhan kami, supaya diampunkanNya kesalahan-kesalahan kami, dan dosa-dosa sihir yang engkau paksakan kami melakukannya. Dan Allah jualah yang lebih baik dan lebih kekal balasan pahalaNya.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ مَن يَأْتِ رَبَّهُۥ مُجْرِمًا فَإِنَّ لَهُۥ جَهَنَّمَ لَا يَمُوتُ فِيهَا وَلَا يَحْيَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Innahu man yati rabbahu mujriman fainna lahu jahannama la yamootu feeha wala yahya

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, whoever comes to his Lord as a criminal - indeed, for him is Hell; he will neither die therein nor live.
translations.en_yusufali: Verily he who comes to his Lord as a sinner (at Judgment),- for him is Hell: therein shall he neither die nor live.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Sebenarnya sesiapa yang datang kepada Tuhannya pada hari akhirat sedang ia bersalah maka sesungguhnya adalah baginya neraka jahannam yang ia tidak mati di dalamnya dan tidak pula hidup.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَن يَأْتِهِۦ مُؤْمِنًا قَدْ عَمِلَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ لَهُمُ ٱلدَّرَجَـٰتُ ٱلْعُلَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Waman yatihi muminan qad AAamila alssalihati faolaika lahumu alddarajatu alAAula

translations.en_sahih: But whoever comes to Him as a believer having done righteous deeds - for those will be the highest degrees [in position]:
translations.en_yusufali: But such as come to Him as Believers who have worked righteous deeds,- for them are ranks exalted,-
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan sesiapa yang datang kepadaNya sedang ia beriman, serta ia telah mengerjakan amal-amal yang soleh, maka mereka itu akan beroleh tempat-tempat tinggal yang tinggi darjatnya:

ayahs.arabic: جَنَّـٰتُ عَدْنٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا ۚ وَذَٰلِكَ جَزَآءُ مَن تَزَكَّىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Jannatu AAadnin tajree min tahtiha alanharu khalideena feeha wathalika jazao man tazakka

translations.en_sahih: Gardens of perpetual residence beneath which rivers flow, wherein they abide eternally. And that is the reward of one who purifies himself.
translations.en_yusufali: Gardens of Eternity, beneath which flow rivers: they will dwell therein for aye: such is the reward of those who purify themselves (from evil).
translations.ms_basmeih: "(Iaitu) Syurga-syurga yang kekal, yang mengalir padanya beberapa sungai, mereka kekal di dalamnya; dan yang demikian itu ialah balasan orang-orang yang membersihkan dirinya dari perbuatan kufur dan maksiat".

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِى فَٱضْرِبْ لَهُمْ طَرِيقًا فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ يَبَسًا لَّا تَخَـٰفُ دَرَكًا وَلَا تَخْشَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad awhayna ila moosa an asri biAAibadee faidrib lahum tareeqan fee albahri yabasan la takhafu darakan wala takhsha

translations.en_sahih: And We had inspired to Moses, "Travel by night with My servants and strike for them a dry path through the sea; you will not fear being overtaken [by Pharaoh] nor be afraid [of drowning]."
translations.en_yusufali: We sent an inspiration to Moses: "Travel by night with My servants, and strike a dry path for them through the sea, without fear of being overtaken (by Pharaoh) and without (any other) fear."
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya! Kami telah wahyukan kepada Nabi Musa: "Hendaklah engkau membawa hamba-hambaKu (kaummu) keluar memgembara pada waktu malam, kemudian pukulah air laut dengan tongkatmu, untuk mengadakan jalan yang kering bagi mereka di laut itu; janganlah engkau menaruh bimbang daripada ditangkap oleh musuh, dan jangan pula engkau takut tenggelam".

ayahs.arabic: فَأَتْبَعَهُمْ فِرْعَوْنُ بِجُنُودِهِۦ فَغَشِيَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْيَمِّ مَا غَشِيَهُمْ
ayahs.transliteration: FaatbaAAahum firAAawnu bijunoodihi faghashiyahum mina alyammi ma ghashiyahum

translations.en_sahih: So Pharaoh pursued them with his soldiers, and there covered them from the sea that which covered them,
translations.en_yusufali: Then Pharaoh pursued them with his forces, but the waters completely overwhelmed them and covered them up.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka Firaun pun mengejar mereka bersama-sama dengan tenteranya, lalu ia dan orang-orangnya diliputi oleh air laut yang menenggelamkan mereka semuanya dengan cara yang sedahsyat-dahsyatnya.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَضَلَّ فِرْعَوْنُ قَوْمَهُۥ وَمَا هَدَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Waadalla firAAawnu qawmahu wama hada

translations.en_sahih: And Pharaoh led his people astray and did not guide [them].
translations.en_yusufali: Pharaoh led his people astray instead of leading them aright.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan dengan itu Firaun telah menjerumuskan kaumnya ke tempat kebinasaan, dan tidaklah ia membawa mereka ke jalan yang benar.

ayahs.arabic: يَـٰبَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ قَدْ أَنجَيْنَـٰكُم مِّنْ عَدُوِّكُمْ وَوَٰعَدْنَـٰكُمْ جَانِبَ ٱلطُّورِ ٱلْأَيْمَنَ وَنَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْمَنَّ وَٱلسَّلْوَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Ya banee israeela qad anjaynakum min AAaduwwikum wawaAAadnakum janiba alttoori alaymana wanazzalna AAalaykumu almanna waalssalwa

translations.en_sahih: O Children of Israel, We delivered you from your enemy, and We made an appointment with you at the right side of the mount, and We sent down to you manna and quails,
translations.en_yusufali: O ye Children of Israel! We delivered you from your enemy, and We made a Covenant with you on the right side of Mount (Sinai), and We sent down to you Manna and quails:
translations.ms_basmeih: Wahai Bani lsrail! Sesungguhnya Kami telah selamatkan kamu dari musuh kamu, dan Kami telah janjikan kamu (dengan memberi wahyu kepada Nabi Musa) di sebelah kanan Gunung Tursina itu, dan kami turunkan kepada kamu "Mann" dan "Salwa",

ayahs.arabic: كُلُوا۟ مِن طَيِّبَـٰتِ مَا رَزَقْنَـٰكُمْ وَلَا تَطْغَوْا۟ فِيهِ فَيَحِلَّ عَلَيْكُمْ غَضَبِى ۖ وَمَن يَحْلِلْ عَلَيْهِ غَضَبِى فَقَدْ هَوَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Kuloo min tayyibati ma razaqnakum wala tatghaw feehi fayahilla AAalaykum ghadabee waman yahlil AAalayhi ghadabee faqad hawa

translations.en_sahih: [Saying], "Eat from the good things with which We have provided you and do not transgress [or oppress others] therein, lest My anger should descend upon you. And he upon whom My anger descends has certainly fallen."
translations.en_yusufali: (Saying): "Eat of the good things We have provided for your sustenance, but commit no excess therein, lest My Wrath should justly descend on you: and those on whom descends My Wrath do perish indeed!
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta Kami katakan: Makanlah dari benda-benda yang baik yang Kami kurniakan kepada kamu, dan janganlah kamu melampaui batas padanya, kerana dengan yang demikian kamu akan ditimpa kemurkaanKu; dan sesiapa yang ditimpa kemurkaanKu, maka sesungguhnya binasalah ia.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنِّى لَغَفَّارٌ لِّمَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَـٰلِحًا ثُمَّ ٱهْتَدَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Wainnee laghaffarun liman taba waamana waAAamila salihan thumma ihtada

translations.en_sahih: But indeed, I am the Perpetual Forgiver of whoever repents and believes and does righteousness and then continues in guidance.
translations.en_yusufali: "But, without doubt, I am (also) He that forgives again and again, to those who repent, believe, and do right, who,- in fine, are ready to receive true guidance."
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Aku yang amat memberi ampun kepada orang-orang yang bertaubat serta beriman dan beramal soleh, kemudian ia tetap teguh menurut petunjuk yang diberikan kepadanya.

ayahs.arabic: ۞ وَمَآ أَعْجَلَكَ عَن قَوْمِكَ يَـٰمُوسَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama aAAjalaka AAan qawmika ya moosa

translations.en_sahih: [Allah] said, "And what made you hasten from your people, O Moses?"
translations.en_yusufali: (When Moses was up on the Mount, Allah said:) "What made thee hasten in advance of thy people, O Moses?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apakah yang menyebabkan engkau segera datang ke mari lebih dahulu dari kaum engkau wahai Musa?.

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ هُمْ أُو۟لَآءِ عَلَىٰٓ أَثَرِى وَعَجِلْتُ إِلَيْكَ رَبِّ لِتَرْضَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala hum olai AAala atharee waAAajiltu ilayka rabbi litarda

translations.en_sahih: He said, "They are close upon my tracks, and I hastened to You, my Lord, that You be pleased."
translations.en_yusufali: He replied: "Behold, they are close on my footsteps: I hastened to thee, O my Lord, to please thee."
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Musa menjawab: "Mereka itu ada mengiringi daku tidak jauh dari sini; dan aku segera datang kepadaMu, wahai Tuhanku, supaya Engkau reda akan daku".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ فَإِنَّا قَدْ فَتَنَّا قَوْمَكَ مِنۢ بَعْدِكَ وَأَضَلَّهُمُ ٱلسَّامِرِىُّ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala fainna qad fatanna qawmaka min baAAdika waadallahumu alssamiriyyu

translations.en_sahih: [Allah] said, "But indeed, We have tried your people after you [departed], and the Samiri has led them astray."
translations.en_yusufali: (Allah) said: "We have tested thy people in thy absence: the Samiri has led them astray."
translations.ms_basmeih: (Setelah selesainya urusan itu) maka Allah berfirman kepada Nabi Musa: "Sesungguhnya Kami telah mengenakan kaummu satu fitnah ujian sepeninggalanmu, dan mereka telah disesatkan oleh Samiri"

ayahs.arabic: فَرَجَعَ مُوسَىٰٓ إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ غَضْبَـٰنَ أَسِفًا ۚ قَالَ يَـٰقَوْمِ أَلَمْ يَعِدْكُمْ رَبُّكُمْ وَعْدًا حَسَنًا ۚ أَفَطَالَ عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْعَهْدُ أَمْ أَرَدتُّمْ أَن يَحِلَّ عَلَيْكُمْ غَضَبٌ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ فَأَخْلَفْتُم مَّوْعِدِى
ayahs.transliteration: FarajaAAa moosa ila qawmihi ghadbana asifan qala ya qawmi alam yaAAidkum rabbukum waAAdan hasanan afatala AAalaykumu alAAahdu am aradtum an yahilla AAalaykum ghadabun min rabbikum faakhlaftum mawAAidee

translations.en_sahih: So Moses returned to his people, angry and grieved. He said, "O my people, did your Lord not make you a good promise? Then, was the time [of its fulfillment] too long for you, or did you wish that wrath from your Lord descend upon you, so you broke your promise [of obedience] to me?"
translations.en_yusufali: So Moses returned to his people in a state of indignation and sorrow. He said: "O my people! did not your Lord make a handsome promise to you? Did then the promise seem to you long (in coming)? Or did ye desire that Wrath should descend from your Lord on you, and so ye broke your promise to me?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka kembalilah Nabi Musa kepada kaumnya dengan perasaan marah dan dukacita; ia berkata: "Wahai kaumku! Bukankah Tuhan kamu telah menjanjikan kamu dengan satu perjanjian yang baik? Patutkah kamu merasa panjang masa pemergianku menerima apa yang dijanjikan itu? Atau kamu sengaja menghendaki supaya kamu ditimpa kemurkaan dari Tuhan kamu, lalu kamu menyalahi perjanjian kamu denganku?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ مَآ أَخْلَفْنَا مَوْعِدَكَ بِمَلْكِنَا وَلَـٰكِنَّا حُمِّلْنَآ أَوْزَارًا مِّن زِينَةِ ٱلْقَوْمِ فَقَذَفْنَـٰهَا فَكَذَٰلِكَ أَلْقَى ٱلسَّامِرِىُّ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo ma akhlafna mawAAidaka bimalkina walakinna hummilna awzaran min zeenati alqawmi faqathafnaha fakathalika alqa alssamiriyyu

translations.en_sahih: They said, "We did not break our promise to you by our will, but we were made to carry burdens from the ornaments of the people [of Pharaoh], so we threw them [into the fire], and thus did the Samiri throw."
translations.en_yusufali: They said: "We broke not the promise to thee, as far as lay in our power: but we were made to carry the weight of the ornaments of the (whole) people, and we threw them (into the fire), and that was what the Samiri suggested.
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka menjawab: "Kami tidak menyalahi janji kami kepadamu itu dengan kuasa dan ikhtiar kami, tetapi kami telah dibebankan membawa barang-barang perhiasan orang-orang (Mesir) itu, supaya kami mencampakkannya ke dalam api lalu kami melakukan yang demikian, maka demikianlah juga "Samiri" mencampakkan apa yang dibawanya.

ayahs.arabic: فَأَخْرَجَ لَهُمْ عِجْلًا جَسَدًا لَّهُۥ خُوَارٌ فَقَالُوا۟ هَـٰذَآ إِلَـٰهُكُمْ وَإِلَـٰهُ مُوسَىٰ فَنَسِىَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faakhraja lahum AAijlan jasadan lahu khuwarun faqaloo hatha ilahukum wailahu moosa fanasiya

translations.en_sahih: And he extracted for them [the statue of] a calf which had a lowing sound, and they said, "This is your god and the god of Moses, but he forgot."
translations.en_yusufali: "Then he brought out (of the fire) before the (people) the image of a calf: It seemed to low: so they said: This is your god, and the god of Moses, but (Moses) has forgotten!"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Kemudian Samiri mengeluarkan untuk mereka dari leburan barang-barang itu (patung) seekor anak lembu yang bertubuh lagi bersuara, lalu mereka berkata: "Ini ialah tuhan kamu dan tuhan bagi Musa, tetapi Musa telah lupa!"

ayahs.arabic: أَفَلَا يَرَوْنَ أَلَّا يَرْجِعُ إِلَيْهِمْ قَوْلًا وَلَا يَمْلِكُ لَهُمْ ضَرًّا وَلَا نَفْعًا
ayahs.transliteration: Afala yarawna alla yarjiAAu ilayhim qawlan wala yamliku lahum darran wala nafAAan

translations.en_sahih: Did they not see that it could not return to them any speech and that it did not possess for them any harm or benefit?
translations.en_yusufali: Could they not see that it could not return them a word (for answer), and that it had no power either to harm them or to do them good?
translations.ms_basmeih: Patutkah mereka tidak mahu berfikir sehingga mereka tidak nampak bahawa patung itu tidak dapat menjawab perkataan mereka, dan tidak berkuasa mendatangkan bahaya atau memberi manfaat kepada mereka?

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ قَالَ لَهُمْ هَـٰرُونُ مِن قَبْلُ يَـٰقَوْمِ إِنَّمَا فُتِنتُم بِهِۦ ۖ وَإِنَّ رَبَّكُمُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ فَٱتَّبِعُونِى وَأَطِيعُوٓا۟ أَمْرِى
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad qala lahum haroonu min qablu ya qawmi innama futintum bihi wainna rabbakumu alrrahmanu faittabiAAoonee waateeAAoo amree

translations.en_sahih: And Aaron had already told them before [the return of Moses], "O my people, you are only being tested by it, and indeed, your Lord is the Most Merciful, so follow me and obey my order."
translations.en_yusufali: Aaron had already, before this said to them: "O my people! ye are being tested in this: for verily your Lord is (Allah) Most Gracious; so follow me and obey my command."
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya, Nabi Harun telahpun berkata kepada mereka sebelum itu: "Wahai kaumku, sesungguhnya kamu hanya diperdayakan dengan patung itu, dan sesungguhnya Tuhan kamu ialah Allah yang melimpah-limpah rahmatNya; oleh itu, ikutlah daku dan taatlah akan perintahku".

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ لَن نَّبْرَحَ عَلَيْهِ عَـٰكِفِينَ حَتَّىٰ يَرْجِعَ إِلَيْنَا مُوسَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo lan nabraha AAalayhi AAakifeena hatta yarjiAAa ilayna moosa

translations.en_sahih: They said, "We will never cease being devoted to the calf until Moses returns to us."
translations.en_yusufali: They had said: "We will not abandon this cult, but we will devote ourselves to it until Moses returns to us."
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka menjawab: "Kami tidak sekali-kali akan meninggalkan penyembahan patung ini, (bahkan) kami akan tetap menyembahnya hingga Nabi Musa kembali kepada kami".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ يَـٰهَـٰرُونُ مَا مَنَعَكَ إِذْ رَأَيْتَهُمْ ضَلُّوٓا۟
ayahs.transliteration: Qala ya haroonu ma manaAAaka ith raaytahum dalloo

translations.en_sahih: [Moses] said, "O Aaron, what prevented you, when you saw them going astray,
translations.en_yusufali: (Moses) said: "O Aaron! what kept thee back, when thou sawest them going wrong,
translations.ms_basmeih: (Sekembalinya), Nabi Musa berkata: "Wahai Harun, apakah maniknya yang menghalangmu ketika engkau melihat mereka sesat,

ayahs.arabic: أَلَّا تَتَّبِعَنِ ۖ أَفَعَصَيْتَ أَمْرِى
ayahs.transliteration: Alla tattabiAAani afaAAasayta amree

translations.en_sahih: From following me? Then have you disobeyed my order?"
translations.en_yusufali: "From following me? Didst thou then disobey my order?"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Daripada menurutku? Adakah engkau ingkar akan suruhanku?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ يَبْنَؤُمَّ لَا تَأْخُذْ بِلِحْيَتِى وَلَا بِرَأْسِىٓ ۖ إِنِّى خَشِيتُ أَن تَقُولَ فَرَّقْتَ بَيْنَ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ وَلَمْ تَرْقُبْ قَوْلِى
ayahs.transliteration: Qala ya bna omma la takhuth bilihyatee wala birasee innee khasheetu an taqoola farraqta bayna banee israeela walam tarqub qawlee

translations.en_sahih: [Aaron] said, "O son of my mother, do not seize [me] by my beard or by my head. Indeed, I feared that you would say, 'You caused division among the Children of Israel, and you did not observe [or await] my word.' "
translations.en_yusufali: (Aaron) replied: "O son of my mother! Seize (me) not by my beard nor by (the hair of) my head! Truly I feared lest thou shouldst say, 'Thou has caused a division among the children of Israel, and thou didst not respect my word!'"
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Harun menjawab: "Wahai anak ibuku! Janganlah engkau meragut janggutku dan janganlah menarik (rambut) kepalaku. Sesungguhnya aku takut bahawa engkau akan berkata kepadaku: ` Engkau telah memecah-belahkan kaum Bani lsrail sesama sendiri, dan engkau tidak berhati-hati mengambil berat pesananku! ' "

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكَ يَـٰسَـٰمِرِىُّ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala fama khatbuka ya samiriyyu

translations.en_sahih: [Moses] said, "And what is your case, O Samiri?"
translations.en_yusufali: (Moses) said: "What then is thy case, O Samiri?"
translations.ms_basmeih: (Sesudah itu Nabi Musa hadapkan kemarahannya kepada Samiri lalu) bertanya: "Apa pula halmu, wahai Samiri?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ بَصُرْتُ بِمَا لَمْ يَبْصُرُوا۟ بِهِۦ فَقَبَضْتُ قَبْضَةً مِّنْ أَثَرِ ٱلرَّسُولِ فَنَبَذْتُهَا وَكَذَٰلِكَ سَوَّلَتْ لِى نَفْسِى
ayahs.transliteration: Qala basurtu bima lam yabsuroo bihi faqabadtu qabdatan min athari alrrasooli fanabathtuha wakathalika sawwalat lee nafsee

translations.en_sahih: He said, "I saw what they did not see, so I took a handful [of dust] from the track of the messenger and threw it, and thus did my soul entice me."
translations.en_yusufali: He replied: "I saw what they saw not: so I took a handful (of dust) from the footprint of the Messenger, and threw it (into the calf): thus did my soul suggest to me."
translations.ms_basmeih: Ia menjawab:" Aku mengetahui dan menyedari apa yang tidak diketahui oleh mereka, lalu aku mengambil segenggam dari kesan jejak Rasul itu, kemudian aku mencampakkannya; dan demikianlah aku dihasut oleh hawa nafsuku".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ فَٱذْهَبْ فَإِنَّ لَكَ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ أَن تَقُولَ لَا مِسَاسَ ۖ وَإِنَّ لَكَ مَوْعِدًا لَّن تُخْلَفَهُۥ ۖ وَٱنظُرْ إِلَىٰٓ إِلَـٰهِكَ ٱلَّذِى ظَلْتَ عَلَيْهِ عَاكِفًا ۖ لَّنُحَرِّقَنَّهُۥ ثُمَّ لَنَنسِفَنَّهُۥ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ نَسْفًا
ayahs.transliteration: Qala faithhab fainna laka fee alhayati an taqoola la misasa wainna laka mawAAidan lan tukhlafahu waonthur ila ilahika allathee thalta AAalayhi AAakifan lanuharriqannahu thumma lanansifannahu fee alyammi nasfan

translations.en_sahih: [Moses] said, "Then go. And indeed, it is [decreed] for you in [this] life to say, 'No contact.' And indeed, you have an appointment [in the Hereafter] you will not fail to keep. And look at your 'god' to which you remained devoted. We will surely burn it and blow it into the sea with a blast.
translations.en_yusufali: (Moses) said: "Get thee gone! but thy (punishment) in this life will be that thou wilt say, 'touch me not'; and moreover (for a future penalty) thou hast a promise that will not fail: Now look at thy god, of whom thou hast become a devoted worshipper: We will certainly (melt) it in a blazing fire and scatter it broadcast in the sea!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Musa berkata kepada Samiri: "Jika demikian, pergilah, (engkau adalah diusir dan dipulaukan), kerana sesungguhnya telah ditetapkan bagimu akan berkata dalam kehidupan dunia ini: ` Jangan sentuh daku ', dan sesungguhnya telah dijanjikan lagi untukmu satu balasan akhirat yang engkau tidak sekali-kali akan terlepas daripadanya. Dan (sekarang) lihatlah kepada tuhanmu yang engkau sekian lama menyembahnya, sesungguhnya kami akan membakarnya kemudian kami akan menghancur dan menaburkan serbuknya di laut sehingga hilang lenyap.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّمَآ إِلَـٰهُكُمُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۚ وَسِعَ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ عِلْمًا
ayahs.transliteration: Innama ilahukumu Allahu allathee la ilaha illa huwa wasiAAa kulla shayin AAilman

translations.en_sahih: Your god is only Allah, except for whom there is no deity. He has encompassed all things in knowledge."
translations.en_yusufali: But the god of you all is the One Allah: there is no god but He: all things He comprehends in His knowledge.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Sesungguhnya Tuhan kamu hanya Allah, yang tidak ada Tuhan melainkan Dia, yang meliputi pengetahuanNya akan tiap-tiap sesuatu".

ayahs.arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ نَقُصُّ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ أَنۢبَآءِ مَا قَدْ سَبَقَ ۚ وَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَـٰكَ مِن لَّدُنَّا ذِكْرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Kathalika naqussu AAalayka min anbai ma qad sabaqa waqad ataynaka min ladunna thikran

translations.en_sahih: Thus, [O Muhammad], We relate to you from the news of what has preceded. And We have certainly given you from Us the Qur'an.
translations.en_yusufali: Thus do We relate to thee some stories of what happened before: for We have sent thee a Message from Our own Presence.
translations.ms_basmeih: Demikianlah Kami ceritakan kepadamu (wahai Muhammad), sebahagian dari kisah-kisah umat manusia yang telah lalu; dan sesungguhnya Kami telah memberikan kepadamu, dari sisi Kami (sebuah Kitab Al-Quran yang menjadi) peringatan.

ayahs.arabic: مَّنْ أَعْرَضَ عَنْهُ فَإِنَّهُۥ يَحْمِلُ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ وِزْرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Man aAArada AAanhu fainnahu yahmilu yawma alqiyamati wizran

translations.en_sahih: Whoever turns away from it - then indeed, he will bear on the Day of Resurrection a burden,
translations.en_yusufali: If any do turn away therefrom, verily they will bear a burden on the Day of judgment;
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesiapa yang berpaling ingkar dari peringatan Al-Quran itu, maka sesungguhnya ia pada hari kiamat menanggung beban (dosa) yang berat.

ayahs.arabic: خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهِ ۖ وَسَآءَ لَهُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ حِمْلًا
ayahs.transliteration: Khalideena feehi wasaa lahum yawma alqiyamati himlan

translations.en_sahih: [Abiding] eternally therein, and evil it is for them on the Day of Resurrection as a load -
translations.en_yusufali: They will abide in this (state): and grievous will the burden be to them on that Day,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka kekal di dalam (azab) dosa itu; dan amatlah buruknya tanggungan itu bagi mereka pada hari kiamat,

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ ۚ وَنَحْشُرُ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ يَوْمَئِذٍ زُرْقًا
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma yunfakhu fee alssoori wanahshuru almujrimeena yawmaithin zurqan

translations.en_sahih: The Day the Horn will be blown. And We will gather the criminals, that Day, blue-eyed.
translations.en_yusufali: The Day when the Trumpet will be sounded: that Day, We shall gather the sinful, blear-eyed (with terror).
translations.ms_basmeih: (Iaitu) hari ditiup Sangkakala, dan Kami akan himpunkan pada hari itu orang-orang yang bersalah dalam keadaan kelabu matanya.

ayahs.arabic: يَتَخَـٰفَتُونَ بَيْنَهُمْ إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا عَشْرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Yatakhafatoona baynahum in labithtum illa AAashran

translations.en_sahih: They will murmur among themselves, "You remained not but ten [days in the world]."
translations.en_yusufali: In whispers will they consult each other: "Yet tarried not longer than ten (Days);
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka berbisik-bisik sesama sendiri: "Kamu telah tinggal hanya sepuluh sahaja".

ayahs.arabic: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ إِذْ يَقُولُ أَمْثَلُهُمْ طَرِيقَةً إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا يَوْمًا
ayahs.transliteration: Nahnu aAAlamu bima yaqooloona ith yaqoolu amthaluhum tareeqatan in labithtum illa yawman

translations.en_sahih: We are most knowing of what they say when the best of them in manner will say, "You remained not but one day."
translations.en_yusufali: We know best what they will say, when their leader most eminent in conduct will say: "Ye tarried not longer than a day!"
translations.ms_basmeih: (Allah berfirman): Kami lebih mengetahui akan kadar masa yang mereka katakan itu, manakala orang yang lebih tepat pendapatnya di antara mereka berkata pula: "Tiadalah kamu tinggal melainkan satu masa yang amat singkat".

ayahs.arabic: وَيَسْـَٔلُونَكَ عَنِ ٱلْجِبَالِ فَقُلْ يَنسِفُهَا رَبِّى نَسْفًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wayasaloonaka AAani aljibali faqul yansifuha rabbee nasfan

translations.en_sahih: And they ask you about the mountains, so say, "My Lord will blow them away with a blast.
translations.en_yusufali: They ask thee concerning the Mountains: say, "My Lord will uproot them and scatter them as dust;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan mereka (yang kafir) bertanya kepadamu (wahai Muhammad) dari hal gunung-ganang; maka jawablah: "Tuhanku akan menghancurkannya menjadi debu ditiup angin.

ayahs.arabic: فَيَذَرُهَا قَاعًا صَفْصَفًا
ayahs.transliteration: Fayatharuha qaAAan safsafan

translations.en_sahih: And He will leave the earth a level plain;
translations.en_yusufali: "He will leave them as plains smooth and level;
translations.ms_basmeih: "Lalu Ia membiarkan tapak gunung-gunung itu (di bumi) rata lagi licin".

ayahs.arabic: لَّا تَرَىٰ فِيهَا عِوَجًا وَلَآ أَمْتًا
ayahs.transliteration: La tara feeha AAiwajan wala amtan

translations.en_sahih: You will not see therein a depression or an elevation."
translations.en_yusufali: "Nothing crooked or curved wilt thou see in their place."
translations.ms_basmeih: Engkau tidak akan melihat pada tapaknya itu tempat yang rendah atau yang tinggi.

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ يَتَّبِعُونَ ٱلدَّاعِىَ لَا عِوَجَ لَهُۥ ۖ وَخَشَعَتِ ٱلْأَصْوَاتُ لِلرَّحْمَـٰنِ فَلَا تَسْمَعُ إِلَّا هَمْسًا
ayahs.transliteration: Yawmaithin yattabiAAoona alddaAAiya la AAiwaja lahu wakhashaAAati alaswatu lilrrahmani fala tasmaAAu illa hamsan

translations.en_sahih: That Day, everyone will follow [the call of] the Caller [with] no deviation therefrom, and [all] voices will be stilled before the Most Merciful, so you will not hear except a whisper [of footsteps].
translations.en_yusufali: On that Day will they follow the Caller (straight): no crookedness (can they show) him: all sounds shall humble themselves in the Presence of (Allah) Most Gracious: nothing shalt thou hear but the tramp of their feet (as they march).
translations.ms_basmeih: Pada hari itu mereka menurut seruan panggilan yang menyeru mereka dengan tidak dapat melencong dari menurutnya; dan diam khusyuklah segala suara kepada Allah yang melimpah-limpah rahmatNya sehingga engkau tidak mendengar melainkan bunyi yang amat perlahan.

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّا تَنفَعُ ٱلشَّفَـٰعَةُ إِلَّا مَنْ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وَرَضِىَ لَهُۥ قَوْلًا
ayahs.transliteration: Yawmaithin la tanfaAAu alshshafaAAatu illa man athina lahu alrrahmanu waradiya lahu qawlan

translations.en_sahih: That Day, no intercession will benefit except [that of] one to whom the Most Merciful has given permission and has accepted his word.
translations.en_yusufali: On that Day shall no intercession avail except for those for whom permission has been granted by (Allah) Most Gracious and whose word is acceptable to Him.
translations.ms_basmeih: Pada hari itu, tidak berfaedah syafaat (dari dan kepada sesiapapun) kecuali dari orang yang diizinkan oleh Allah yang melimpah-limpah rahmatNya, dan kepada orang yang diredai perkataannya.

ayahs.arabic: يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِهِۦ عِلْمًا
ayahs.transliteration: YaAAlamu ma bayna aydeehim wama khalfahum wala yuheetoona bihi AAilman

translations.en_sahih: Allah knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them, but they do not encompass it in knowledge.
translations.en_yusufali: He knows what (appears to His creatures as) before or after or behind them: but they shall not compass it with their knowledge.
translations.ms_basmeih: Allah mengetahui apa yang di hadapan mereka (dari hal-hal dunia), dan apa yang di belakang mereka (dari perkara akhirat); sedang mereka tidak mengetahuinya secara meliputi.

ayahs.arabic: ۞ وَعَنَتِ ٱلْوُجُوهُ لِلْحَىِّ ٱلْقَيُّومِ ۖ وَقَدْ خَابَ مَنْ حَمَلَ ظُلْمًا
ayahs.transliteration: WaAAanati alwujoohu lilhayyi alqayyoomi waqad khaba man hamala thulman

translations.en_sahih: And [all] faces will be humbled before the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of existence. And he will have failed who carries injustice.
translations.en_yusufali: (All) faces shall be humbled before (Him) - the Living, the Self-Subsisting, Eternal: hopeless indeed will be the man that carries iniquity (on his back).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan segala muka akan tunduk dengan berupa hina kepada Allah Yang Tetap Hidup, lagi Yang Kekal Mentadbirkan makhluk selama-lamanya; dan sesungguhnya telah rugi dan hampalah orang yang menanggung dosa kezaliman.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ وَهُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ فَلَا يَخَافُ ظُلْمًا وَلَا هَضْمًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waman yaAAmal mina alssalihati wahuwa muminun fala yakhafu thulman wala hadman

translations.en_sahih: But he who does of righteous deeds while he is a believer - he will neither fear injustice nor deprivation.
translations.en_yusufali: But he who works deeds of righteousness, and has faith, will have no fear of harm nor of any curtailment (of what is his due).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesiapa yang mengerjakan sebarang apa dari amal-amal yang soleh, sedang ia beriman, maka tidaklah (seharusnya) ia merasa takut dianiaya atau dikurangkan sedikitpun dari pahalanya.

ayahs.arabic: وَكَذَٰلِكَ أَنزَلْنَـٰهُ قُرْءَانًا عَرَبِيًّا وَصَرَّفْنَا فِيهِ مِنَ ٱلْوَعِيدِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَّقُونَ أَوْ يُحْدِثُ لَهُمْ ذِكْرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wakathalika anzalnahu quranan AAarabiyyan wasarrafna feehi mina alwaAAeedi laAAallahum yattaqoona aw yuhdithu lahum thikran

translations.en_sahih: And thus We have sent it down as an Arabic Qur'an and have diversified therein the warnings that perhaps they will avoid [sin] or it would cause them remembrance.
translations.en_yusufali: Thus have We sent this down - an arabic Qur'an - and explained therein in detail some of the warnings, in order that they may fear Allah, or that it may cause their remembrance (of Him).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demikianlah Kami telah menurunkan Al-Quran sebagai bacaan dalam bahasa Arab, dan kami telah terangkan di dalamnya berbagai-bagai amaran supaya mereka (umat manusia seluruhnya) bertaqwa, atau mereka mendapat daripadanya sesuatu peringatan dari faedah mereka.

ayahs.arabic: فَتَعَـٰلَى ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْحَقُّ ۗ وَلَا تَعْجَلْ بِٱلْقُرْءَانِ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يُقْضَىٰٓ إِلَيْكَ وَحْيُهُۥ ۖ وَقُل رَّبِّ زِدْنِى عِلْمًا
ayahs.transliteration: FataAAala Allahu almaliku alhaqqu wala taAAjal bialqurani min qabli an yuqda ilayka wahyuhu waqul rabbi zidnee AAilman

translations.en_sahih: So high [above all] is Allah, the Sovereign, the Truth. And, [O Muhammad], do not hasten with [recitation of] the Qur'an before its revelation is completed to you, and say, "My Lord, increase me in knowledge."
translations.en_yusufali: High above all is Allah, the King, the Truth! Be not in haste with the Qur'an before its revelation to thee is completed, but say, "O my Lord! advance me in knowledge."
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka Maha Tinggilah Allah, yang Menguasai seluruh alam, lagi Yang Benar (pada segala-galanya). Dan janganlah engkau (wahai Muhammad) tergesa-gesa membaca Al-Quran sebelum selesai dibacakan oleh Jibril kepadamu, dan berdoalah dengan berkata: "Wahai Tuhanku, tambahilah ilmuku".

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ عَهِدْنَآ إِلَىٰٓ ءَادَمَ مِن قَبْلُ فَنَسِىَ وَلَمْ نَجِدْ لَهُۥ عَزْمًا
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad AAahidna ila adama min qablu fanasiya walam najid lahu AAazman

translations.en_sahih: And We had already taken a promise from Adam before, but he forgot; and We found not in him determination.
translations.en_yusufali: We had already, beforehand, taken the covenant of Adam, but he forgot: and We found on his part no firm resolve.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya, Kami telah berpesan kepada Adam pada masa yang lalu, tetapi ia lupa; dan kami tidak mendapatinya mempunyai keazaman yang teguh.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِذْ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةِ ٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِـَٔادَمَ فَسَجَدُوٓا۟ إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Waith qulna lilmalaikati osjudoo liadama fasajadoo illa ibleesa aba

translations.en_sahih: And [mention] when We said to the angels, "Prostrate to Adam," and they prostrated, except Iblees; he refused.
translations.en_yusufali: When We said to the angels, "Prostrate yourselves to Adam", they prostrated themselves, but not Iblis: he refused.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (ingatkanlah peristiwa) ketika Kami berfirman kepada malaikat: "Sujudlah kamu kepada Adam", lalu mereka sujud, melainkan Iblis, ia enggan sujud.

ayahs.arabic: فَقُلْنَا يَـٰٓـَٔادَمُ إِنَّ هَـٰذَا عَدُوٌّ لَّكَ وَلِزَوْجِكَ فَلَا يُخْرِجَنَّكُمَا مِنَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ فَتَشْقَىٰٓ
ayahs.transliteration: Faqulna ya adamu inna hatha AAaduwwun laka walizawjika fala yukhrijannakuma mina aljannati fatashqa

translations.en_sahih: So We said, "O Adam, indeed this is an enemy to you and to your wife. Then let him not remove you from Paradise so you would suffer.
translations.en_yusufali: Then We said: "O Adam! verily, this is an enemy to thee and thy wife: so let him not get you both out of the Garden, so that thou art landed in misery.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka, Kami berfirman: "Wahai Adam sesungguhnya Iblis ini musuh bagimu dan bagi isterimu; oleh itu, janganlah ia menyebabkan kamu berdua keluar dari Syurga, kerana dengan yang demikian engkau (dan isterimu) akan menderita.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ لَكَ أَلَّا تَجُوعَ فِيهَا وَلَا تَعْرَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna laka alla tajooAAa feeha wala taAAra

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, it is [promised] for you not to be hungry therein or be unclothed.
translations.en_yusufali: "There is therein (enough provision) for thee not to go hungry nor to go naked,
translations.ms_basmeih: "Sesungguhnya telah dikurniakan berbagai nikmat bagimu, bahawa engkau tidak akan lapar dalam Syurga itu dan tidak akan bertelanjang.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَنَّكَ لَا تَظْمَؤُا۟ فِيهَا وَلَا تَضْحَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Waannaka la tathmao feeha wala tadha

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, you will not be thirsty therein or be hot from the sun."
translations.en_yusufali: "Nor to suffer from thirst, nor from the sun's heat."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan sesungguhnya engkau juga tidak akan dahaga dalam Syurga itu, dan tidak akan merasa panas matahari".

ayahs.arabic: فَوَسْوَسَ إِلَيْهِ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنُ قَالَ يَـٰٓـَٔادَمُ هَلْ أَدُلُّكَ عَلَىٰ شَجَرَةِ ٱلْخُلْدِ وَمُلْكٍ لَّا يَبْلَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Fawaswasa ilayhi alshshaytanu qala ya adamu hal adulluka AAala shajarati alkhuldi wamulkin la yabla

translations.en_sahih: Then Satan whispered to him; he said, "O Adam, shall I direct you to the tree of eternity and possession that will not deteriorate?"
translations.en_yusufali: But Satan whispered evil to him: he said, "O Adam! shall I lead thee to the Tree of Eternity and to a kingdom that never decays?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Setelah itu maka Syaitan membisikkan (hasutan) kepadanya, dengan berkata: "Wahai Adam, mahukah, aku tunjukkan kepadamu pohon yang menyebabkan hidup selama-lamanya, dan kekuasaan yang tidak akan hilang lenyap?"

ayahs.arabic: فَأَكَلَا مِنْهَا فَبَدَتْ لَهُمَا سَوْءَٰتُهُمَا وَطَفِقَا يَخْصِفَانِ عَلَيْهِمَا مِن وَرَقِ ٱلْجَنَّةِ ۚ وَعَصَىٰٓ ءَادَمُ رَبَّهُۥ فَغَوَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Faakala minha fabadat lahuma sawatuhuma watafiqa yakhsifani AAalayhima min waraqi aljannati waAAasa adamu rabbahu faghawa

translations.en_sahih: And Adam and his wife ate of it, and their private parts became apparent to them, and they began to fasten over themselves from the leaves of Paradise. And Adam disobeyed his Lord and erred.
translations.en_yusufali: In the result, they both ate of the tree, and so their nakedness appeared to them: they began to sew together, for their covering, leaves from the Garden: thus did Adam disobey his Lord, and allow himself to be seduced.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian mereka berdua memakan dari pohon itu, lalu terdedahlah kepada mereka aurat masing-masing, dan mereka mulailah menutupnya dengan daun-daun dari Syurga; dan dengan itu derhakalah Adam kepada Tuhannya, lalu tersalah jalan (dari mencapai hajatnya).

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ ٱجْتَبَـٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَتَابَ عَلَيْهِ وَهَدَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma ijtabahu rabbuhu fataba AAalayhi wahada

translations.en_sahih: Then his Lord chose him and turned to him in forgiveness and guided [him].
translations.en_yusufali: But his Lord chose him (for His Grace): He turned to him, and gave him Guidance.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian Tuhannya memilihnya (dengan diberi taufiq untuk bertaubat), lalu Allah menerima taubatnya serta diberi petunjuk.

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ ٱهْبِطَا مِنْهَا جَمِيعًۢا ۖ بَعْضُكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ عَدُوٌّ ۖ فَإِمَّا يَأْتِيَنَّكُم مِّنِّى هُدًى فَمَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ هُدَاىَ فَلَا يَضِلُّ وَلَا يَشْقَىٰ
